- Title: Promotional advertisement for Troika cards in Moscow.
- DistinctiveFeatures: Bright red background with white and dark text, prominently displaying information about a giveaway of Troika cards, which are public transport cards in Moscow. Includes images of the cards featuring stylized train graphics and the Moscow skyline.
- ObjectsAndLayout:
  - [center, foreground] Troika cards image showing various angles of the card with transportation symbols.
  - [top left] Bold text “РОЗЫГРЫШ” (which means "giveaway").
  - [bottom] Details about the card’s nominal value of 3000₽ and the number of cards available (20).
- Context: Digital promotional graphic, likely intended for social media or advertising print, with a clear focus on public transportation in an urban setting.
- TextInImage: 
  - “Москва сегодня @moscow город движения”
  - “РОЗЫГРЫШ”
  - “РАЗЫГРЫВАЕМ ТРОЙКИ НОМИНАЛОМ 3000₽”
  - “20 ШТУК”
  - “на удобные поездки по Москве”
- ColorsPatternsMaterials: Dominant colors are red (background) and white (text). The cards are illustrated with a glossy finish, appearing modern.
- ActionsAndPoses: None; the graphic is static and promotional in nature.
- CameraViewpoint: Front-facing view typical for advertisements, emphasizing the text and images clearly.
- Uncertainties: None.
- Names: Not applicable; refers to the Troika cards and Moscow without specific individual names.
- NSFW: No NSFW details present.

**Facts:**
- The image promotes a giveaway of Troika cards.
- The giveaway features 20 cards valued at 3000₽ each.
- The background is predominantly red, suggesting urgency and attention.
- The cards depicted are related to public transportation in Moscow.
- The ad includes both contact and social media information for local engagement.
- No dynamic elements; the image serves purely to inform and attract interest.
